title: AI in Financial Technology

modules.title: Algorithmic Trading Systems
modules.sub: How AI drives automated decisions in modern financial markets
modules.description: Learners explore how machine learning models execute trades at speeds and scales beyond human capacity. They analyze the architecture of trading algorithms, including signal generation, risk controls, and execution logic. By the end, learners can evaluate the strategic trade-offs of deploying algorithmic systems in live markets.

modules.title: Credit Scoring and Lending
modules.sub: Using AI to assess borrower risk and make lending decisions
modules.description: Learners examine how traditional credit scoring is being replaced and augmented by AI-driven models that draw on broader data signals. They work through how lenders balance predictive accuracy with regulatory requirements around fairness and explainability. Learners leave able to critically assess the design choices behind an AI-powered credit decisioning system.

modules.title: Fraud Detection Methods
modules.sub: Identifying and stopping financial fraud with intelligent systems
modules.description: Learners investigate how AI models detect anomalous patterns across transactions to flag potential fraud in real time. They consider the operational challenges of minimizing false positives while maintaining high recall on genuine fraud cases. The module equips learners to evaluate and compare detection approaches used across banking, payments, and insurance contexts.

modules.title: Personal Finance AI Tools
modules.sub: AI-powered tools reshaping how individuals manage their money
modules.description: Learners survey the landscape of consumer-facing AI applications, from budgeting assistants and robo-advisors to personalized savings recommendations. They assess how these tools use behavioral data to deliver tailored financial guidance and what that means for user trust and data privacy. Learners finish with a framework for evaluating the effectiveness and ethical implications of personal finance AI products.

synopsis: Discover how AI transforms banking, investing, and personal finance management. Learn about algorithmic trading, credit decisions, and fraud prevention.
